name: Alma College Stone Rec Center
description: Alma College Stone Rec Center is a place to play pickleball in Alma, MI. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Alma Senior High School
description: Alma Senior High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Alma, MI. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Leisure Lake Family Campgrounds
description: Leisure Lake Family Campgrounds is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sumner, MI. You'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.
